title: The Lamp.
content:
When a man's faith is frozen up, as dead;
    Then is the lamp and oil extinguished.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Lamp.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
